item.name: Emberwisp
item.description:
This wavekin is said to be a discarded torch come to life, fated to roam the waters forevermore.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: When seen weaving through the water, these reddish fish take on the appearance of flames flickering in the depths. Indeed, the legend surrounding this wavekin tells of a torch─jettisoned by a bandit in a bid to shake their pursuers─coming to life underwater.
